issue_summaries.root_cause: Multiple rows share identity keys (phone/email) across ingestion paths.
issue_summaries.suggested_fix: Review duplicate groups and apply dedupe recipe in dry-run first.

issue_summaries.root_cause: Missing/invalid required fields from source or normalization layers.
issue_summaries.suggested_fix: Run validation-safe auto-fix recipes; unresolved rows should be queued for admin review.

issue_summaries.root_cause: Canonical DB values differ from API/rendered snapshots.
issue_summaries.suggested_fix: Run comparison workflow, inspect diffs, then approve targeted fix recipes.

issue_summaries.root_cause: High null-ratio / sparse columns / weak indexing coverage.
issue_summaries.suggested_fix: Apply index and hierarchy repair recipes with pre-fix simulation.

issue_summaries.root_cause: Multiple high severity discrepancies in deterministic comparison output.
issue_summaries.suggested_fix: Pause broad fixes, review impacted entities, then run scoped auto-fix plan.

trend_history.note: Trend history is derived from persisted comparison history and repeated runs.

suggested_fixes: Start with dry-run previews for all fixes.
Only execute approved workflows in sequence: detect -> preview -> backup -> execute -> validate.
Use rollback manifests for any failed validation.
